hub.title: Ask AfroTools AI
hub.description: Ask AfroTools AI turns practical prompts into the right AfroTools calculators, planners, documents, exports, and source-aware tools.

verticals.title: AI Scholarship and Study Abroad Planner
verticals.metaTitle: AI Scholarship and Study Abroad Planner | AfroTools
verticals.description: Plan study abroad from Africa with destination fit, budget gaps, scholarship routes, document checklists, IELTS/GPA helpers, and source warnings.
verticals.primaryPrompt: I want to study in Canada from Nigeria with a budget of $8,000
verticals.summary: Use this page when a student or parent needs to turn a study-abroad idea into practical next steps. AfroTools AI points them to Scholarship Finder, Study Abroad Cost, GPA, IELTS, and education planning tools instead of inventing admissions promises.
useCases: Compare destination fit by origin country, budget, study level, field, GPA or grade band, English score, and intake timeline.
Estimate the funding gap between budget, tuition, living costs, visa/proof-of-funds assumptions, and scholarship possibilities.
Build a document and deadline checklist before opening the underlying education tools.
examplePrompts: I want to study in Canada from Nigeria with a budget of $8,000
Find scholarships for a Ghanaian master's student in public health in the UK
Plan Germany study abroad from Cameroon with no IELTS yet
Which documents should a Kenyan student prepare for Australia intake?

tools.label: Scholarship Finder
tools.note: Scholarship matching, deadline notes, and provider verification links.

tools.label: Study Abroad Cost
tools.note: Tuition, living-cost, FX, and budget-gap planning.

tools.label: GPA Calculator
tools.note: Grade and GPA conversion support before scholarship matching.

tools.label: IELTS Band Calculator
tools.note: English-score readiness checks for destination requirements.

limitations: AfroTools does not guarantee admission, funding, visa approval, or scholarship availability.
Scholarship deadlines, fees, visa requirements, and proof-of-funds rules can change quickly.
Always verify final requirements on the university, funder, and government source pages.
verticals.privacy: Education prompts can include personal academic details. Local matching works without AI consent; any model-assisted study-plan brief should be optional and consented.

faqs.question: Does AfroTools AI apply for scholarships for me?
faqs.answer: No. It helps organize your profile, likely tools, document checklist, and source links. Applications still happen on the official provider or university site.

faqs.question: Can I use it without sending my academic details to AI?
faqs.answer: Yes. Local matching and tool links work without model consent. Optional AI text should require consent before profile details are sent.

faqs.question: Which countries does the planner support?
faqs.answer: The planner is designed for African origin countries and common destinations such as Canada, the UK, Germany, Australia, the US, and regional African study options where data exists.

verticals.title: AI CV and Career Agent
verticals.metaTitle: AI CV and Career Agent | AfroTools
verticals.description: Turn career prompts into CV Builder, cover letters, ATS guidance, LinkedIn help, templates, and application packs with a private handoff.
verticals.primaryPrompt: Build a Ghana electrical engineer CV and open the CV Builder
verticals.summary: Use the Career Agent to move from a job goal to the right CV, cover-letter, LinkedIn, and ATS tools. It can suggest country-aware starting structure, but it should never invent degrees, employers, dates, certifications, or achievements.
useCases: Turn a role and country into a CV template suggestion without storing private CV content in the URL.
Prepare an application-pack checklist with CV, cover letter, LinkedIn, ATS, and job-tracker next steps.
Offer optional AI starter profile text only after consent, with manual templates always available.
examplePrompts: Write me a CV for an electrical engineer in Ghana
Create a cover letter for a junior accountant role in Kenya
Help me improve my ATS score for a South Africa data analyst CV
Make a job application pack for a Nigerian graduate trainee role

tools.label: CV Builder
tools.note: Templates, local editing, ATS-friendly structure, and export.

tools.label: Cover Letter Generator
tools.note: Role-specific cover letter drafting with local-first handling.

tools.label: LinkedIn Optimizer
tools.note: Profile headline, about, and keyword planning.

tools.label: Job Offer Evaluator
tools.note: Compare pay, benefits, and risk signals before accepting.

limitations: AfroTools cannot verify a user's work history, degrees, certifications, or references.
Generated career text must be edited so it stays truthful and specific to the user.
Do not paste sensitive CV content into optional AI features unless you understand and consent to what is sent.
verticals.privacy: Career data is sensitive. Core CV and cover-letter tools should remain local-first by default, and analytics must use metadata only.

faqs.question: Will the Career Agent fabricate experience for me?
faqs.answer: No. It should not invent employers, degrees, dates, certifications, metrics, or achievements. It can suggest structure and wording for details you provide.

faqs.question: Can I continue without AI-generated text?
faqs.answer: Yes. Manual templates, ATS guidance, and local exports remain available without model assistance.

faqs.question: Does the CV handoff expose my private data in the URL?
faqs.answer: No. The Ask AfroTools AI handoff uses short-lived browser storage for supported setup fields instead of putting private CV content into query strings.

verticals.title: AI SME Finance Assistant
verticals.description: Turn African SME prompts into PAYE, payroll, VAT, invoice, TIN, registration, cash-flow, and compliance checklist help.
verticals.primaryPrompt: Run Kenya payroll for 5 employees and prepare a review checklist
verticals.summary: Use the SME Finance Assistant when a business owner asks for payroll, VAT, invoice, registration, or cash-flow help. It points them to calculators and document tools with high-stakes warnings instead of pretending to be a tax adviser.
useCases: Collect country, employee count, gross pay, pay period, deductions, benefits, invoice amount, currency, and VAT treatment.
Send payroll questions to PAYE, business tax to VAT, invoices to invoice generation, and compliance questions to TIN or registration checklists.
Prepare sponsor-safe accounting partner surfaces without changing formulas or rankings.
examplePrompts: Help me calculate payroll for 5 employees in Kenya
Create a VAT invoice in Ghana for GHS 12,000
What PAYE should I estimate for a Ghana employee earning 6,000 monthly?
Help me register a small business and get a TIN in Nigeria

tools.label: PAYE Calculator
tools.note: Salary tax and payroll planning by supported country.

tools.label: VAT Calculator
tools.note: VAT-exclusive, VAT-inclusive, and planning estimates.

tools.label: Invoice Generator
tools.note: Draft invoices and receipts with export options.

tools.label: Cash Flow Forecast
tools.note: Plan monthly inflows, outflows, and cash pressure.

tools.label: Business Registration Checklist
tools.note: Registration steps, documents, and official-source reminders.

tools.label: TIN Registration Guide
tools.note: Tax identification steps for supported countries.

limitations: Outputs are planning estimates, not tax, accounting, legal, payroll filing, or revenue-authority advice.
Rates, exemptions, filings, and social-security rules can change and need official verification.
Sponsors or partners must not alter calculations, eligibility logic, or source labels.
verticals.privacy: Payroll, invoice, and finance data can be sensitive. Do not store raw salaries, client names, invoice contents, or tax identifiers in analytics.

faqs.question: Can AfroTools AI file my taxes or payroll?
faqs.answer: No. It points you to calculators and planning checklists. Final filings should be verified with the revenue authority or a qualified accountant.

faqs.question: Does sponsor placement affect the formulas?
faqs.answer: No. Sponsor-safe surfaces must be clearly labeled and cannot change formulas, rankings, or compliance warnings.

faqs.question: Which SME tasks are supported first?
faqs.answer: PAYE, payroll planning, VAT, invoices, cash flow, TIN, and business-registration checklist help are supported first.

verticals.title: AI Import Duty and Trade Advisor
verticals.metaTitle: AI Import Duty and Trade Advisor | AfroTools
verticals.description: Estimate import duty, landed cost, CIF assumptions, car-import scenarios, HS-code help, and trade planning checklists with source confidence warnings.
verticals.primaryPrompt: Estimate a 2016 Toyota Axio landed cost into Nigeria before clearing
verticals.summary: Use the Trade Advisor when a user asks about import duty, car imports, electronics, clothing, machinery, CIF, shipping, insurance, FX, or HS-code planning. It asks for missing values and opens the import-duty and car-import calculators.
useCases: Extract destination country, product or vehicle mode, make, model, year, value, shipping, insurance, origin, port, engine size, and FX rate.
Produce a planning estimate with CIF, duty/tax assumptions, clearing/port estimates, landed cost, and verification checklist.
Open Car Import Cost for vehicle questions and Import Duty, Landed Cost, HS Code, or trade finance tools for product questions.
examplePrompts: How much duty will I pay to import a 2016 Toyota Axio into Nigeria?
Estimate landed cost for electronics from China to Ghana
What should I ask a clearing agent before importing clothing into Kenya?
Help me compare CIF, duty and port charges for machinery into Tanzania

tools.label: Import Duty Calculator
tools.note: Duty, levy, tax, and landed-cost planning with source labels.

tools.label: Car Import Cost
tools.note: Vehicle landed-cost and on-road planning for key African markets.

tools.label: Car Price Directory
tools.note: Source-market, landed-cost, and local asking-range context.

tools.label: Landed Cost Calculator
tools.note: FOB, freight, insurance, port, duty, VAT, and landed-cost structure.

tools.label: HS Code Lookup
tools.note: Search product classification starting points.

limitations: Import estimates are planning estimates only; final customs assessment may differ.
HS classification, valuation, waivers, FX, port fees, and clearing charges require official or professional verification.
AfroTools does not replace a licensed clearing agent, customs broker, or revenue authority decision.
verticals.privacy: Trade prompts can reveal commercial plans. Analytics should store category, country, and confidence metadata rather than raw purchase details.

faqs.question: Can the Trade Advisor guarantee the final duty?
faqs.answer: No. It produces a planning estimate and a verification checklist. Customs valuation and classification remain the official decision points.

faqs.question: Does it support cars and non-vehicle products?
faqs.answer: Yes. Vehicle prompts can open car import tools, while electronics, clothing, machinery, and other goods can open import-duty, landed-cost, and HS-code tools.

faqs.question: What inputs improve the estimate?
faqs.answer: Destination country, product category or vehicle details, purchase value, currency, freight, insurance, port, origin country, and any user FX rate.

verticals.title: AI Solar and Generator Advisor
verticals.metaTitle: AI Solar and Generator Advisor | AfroTools
verticals.description: Compare generator fuel exposure, grid bills, outage costs, rough solar sizing, payback, installer questions, and source freshness warnings.
verticals.primaryPrompt: Compare solar vs generator costs for a Lagos shop
verticals.summary: Use the Energy Advisor when a household, shop, office, school, farm, or small business wants to compare generator dependence, grid bills, fuel exposure, outage hours, and solar payback before talking to installers.
useCases: Collect country, city, user type, electricity bill, generator size, generator hours, fuel type, load estimate, outage hours, and budget range.
Calculate monthly generator cost, annual fuel exposure, rough solar system size, payback estimate, and installer questions.
Open Solar ROI, Fuel Tracker, generator sizing, backup duration, and electricity tools.
examplePrompts: Should I install solar for my shop in Lagos?
Estimate generator cost for a Nairobi home running 4 hours daily
Compare solar payback for an Accra office with a diesel generator
What questions should a Johannesburg small business ask a solar installer?

tools.label: Solar ROI Calculator
tools.note: Payback, battery, tariff, fuel, and source-assumption planning.

tools.label: Fuel Tracker
tools.note: Fuel-price context for generator operating costs.

tools.label: Generator Sizing
tools.note: Generator/load sizing before comparing backup options.

tools.label: Backup Duration
tools.note: Battery and backup runtime planning.

tools.label: Electricity Bill Verify
tools.note: Check grid bill assumptions before payback estimates.

limitations: Solar sizing and payback are rough planning estimates, not installer quotes or engineering designs.
Fuel prices, tariffs, battery costs, and outage patterns vary by city, supplier, and date.
Always ask installers about load audit, roof/site survey, warranties, after-sales support, and code compliance.
verticals.privacy: Energy inputs are usually low sensitivity, but business bills and operating hours can be commercially sensitive. Keep raw details local unless the user consents to AI text help.

faqs.question: Can the Energy Advisor design my solar system?
faqs.answer: No. It gives a planning brief and questions to ask installers. Final design needs a site survey and qualified installer.

faqs.question: Does it account for fuel price freshness?
faqs.answer: The tool should show source and freshness state for fuel and tariff assumptions when those assumptions affect results.

faqs.question: What makes the estimate more useful?
faqs.answer: Monthly bill, generator kVA, fuel type, hours per day, outage hours, appliance load, city, and rough budget.

verticals.title: AI Cost of Living and Relocation Planner
verticals.metaTitle: AI Cost of Living and Relocation Planner | AfroTools
verticals.description: Plan city moves, rent, food, transport, utilities, school fees, relocation budgets, and cost-of-living comparisons with practical AfroTools tools.
verticals.primaryPrompt: Can I live in Nairobi on a budget of $1,200 per month?
verticals.summary: Use Local Life AI when a user wants to compare cities, plan rent, estimate monthly expenses, relocate, or understand budget pressure. It opens cost-of-living, rent, transport, school-fee, and relocation tools.
useCases: Collect origin, destination, city, household size, monthly income or budget, currency, rent expectation, school needs, and transport pattern.
Estimate budget pressure across rent, food, transport, utilities, school, healthcare, and one-off relocation costs.
Open Cost of Living, Rent Affordability, School Fees, Transport Fare, Visa Cost, and city/country tools.
examplePrompts: Can I live in Nairobi on a budget of $1,200 per month?
Compare cost of living in Lagos and Accra for a family of four
Plan relocation from Nigeria to the UK with a 6-month savings target
What rent can I afford in Johannesburg if I earn R35,000 monthly?

tools.label: Cost of Living Planner
tools.note: Monthly budget and expense-pressure planning.

tools.label: Rent Affordability
tools.note: Estimate sustainable rent from income and other obligations.

tools.label: School Fees
tools.note: Education-cost planning for families.

tools.label: Route Cost
tools.note: Transport and commute cost planning.

tools.label: Visa Cost
tools.note: Relocation and travel cost assumptions.

limitations: Cost-of-living figures can vary widely by neighborhood, lifestyle, household needs, and exchange rate.
Relocation and visa estimates are planning aids, not immigration advice.
Verify rents, fees, utilities, visa rules, and exchange rates before making commitments.
verticals.privacy: Budget and relocation prompts can reveal salary, family, or travel details. Saved projects should keep only non-sensitive summaries by default.

faqs.question: Is the relocation planner immigration advice?
faqs.answer: No. It helps organize costs, documents, and next steps. Immigration and visa decisions must be checked with official sources or qualified advisers.

faqs.question: Can I compare two African cities?
faqs.answer: Yes. Use city, budget, household size, rent preference, and transport assumptions to open cost-of-living and rent tools.

faqs.question: Does AfroTools store my salary or family details?
faqs.answer: The default Ask AfroTools AI project model should save only clean summaries and structured inputs, not raw sensitive personal details.

verticals.title: AI Floor Planner and Construction Cost Assistant
verticals.metaTitle: AI Floor Planner and Construction Cost Assistant | AfroTools
verticals.description: Turn room, house, shop, renovation, BOQ, material, and construction budget prompts into floor-planning and cost-estimation help.
verticals.primaryPrompt: Design a simple 2-bedroom floor plan for a 450 sqm plot in Benin City
verticals.summary: Use the Construction Assistant when a user wants to move from a room or building idea into a practical floor plan, BOQ, material estimate, renovation budget, or contractor checklist. It opens tools rather than pretending to be a licensed architect or quantity surveyor.
useCases: Collect country, city, room type, floor area, number of rooms, finish level, budget, material assumptions, and export needs.
Open Floor Planner, BOQ Builder, construction budget, home renovation, roofing, tiles, paint, and material calculators.
Prepare a contractor question checklist and a source/assumption warning for prices and quantities.
examplePrompts: Design a small shop floor plan and estimate construction cost in Ghana
Create a 2-bedroom floor plan for a 12 by 18 metre plot
Estimate renovation cost for a kitchen in Lagos
Prepare a BOQ checklist for a small office fit-out in Kenya

tools.label: Floor Planner
tools.note: Layout planning, room notes, and export-oriented workspace.

tools.label: BOQ Builder
tools.note: Bill of quantities structure and cost-line planning.

tools.label: Home Renovation Cost
tools.note: Room-by-room renovation cost planning.

tools.label: Construction Budget
tools.note: Budget structure for building projects.

tools.label: Paint Calculator
tools.note: Paint quantities and cost assumptions.

tools.label: Tiles Calculator
tools.note: Tile quantity and wastage planning.

limitations: AfroTools is not a licensed architect, engineer, quantity surveyor, or building-control authority.
Material prices, labor rates, code requirements, and site conditions vary by location and date.
Use outputs as planning notes for a qualified professional, not as final construction drawings or approvals.
verticals.privacy: Construction prompts can include property and budget details. Keep exact addresses, client names, and private plans out of analytics and share links.

faqs.question: Can AfroTools AI produce approved building drawings?
faqs.answer: No. It can open floor-planning and cost tools, but approvals and professional drawings require qualified local professionals.

faqs.question: Does it estimate materials?
faqs.answer: It can open BOQ, paint, tiles, roofing, renovation, and construction-budget tools that provide planning estimates.

faqs.question: What should I verify before building?
faqs.answer: Confirm land title, permits, setbacks, structural design, contractor scope, material specs, and current local prices.
